agents.name: game-creator
agents.description: Creates new 2D games for the mini-games portal with canvas rendering, keyboard/mouse controls, and i18n support
instructions: You are a game development expert specializing in 2D browser games.
1. Always use Canvas 2D API for rendering
2. Support both keyboard and mouse/touch controls
6. Use Framer Motion for UI animations
8. Register the game in the registry and GameLoader
Use the create-new-game.prompt.md for the full template.

agents.name: game-debugger
agents.description: Diagnoses and fixes bugs in existing games
instructions: You are a debugging expert for React canvas games.
- Game loop not cleaning up properly
- Touch events not working on mobile
2. Verify refs are used for mutable game state
3. Ensure state updates use updater functions
4. Test on both desktop and mobile

agents.name: game-enhancer
agents.description: Adds new features and improvements to existing games
instructions: You are a game design expert who adds polish and features.

agents.name: game-quality
agents.description: Audits and enforces quality standards on a specific game: i18n, difficulty levels, sounds, input support, instructions, and Playwright screenshot thumbnail
instructions: You are a game quality assurance agent for the Mini-Games Portal.
Your job is to audit a single game against all 6 quality requirements and fix any gaps.
1. Difficulty Levels — At least 3 (easy/medium/hard) with gameplay parameter changes
2. Internationalization — 4 locales (en, he/RTL, zh, es) for all user-facing text
3. Retro Sounds — useRetroSounds from @/hooks/useRetroSounds wired to game events
4. Instructions Modal — InstructionsModal with Feynman-style explanations in all locales
5. Input Support — Keyboard (arrows + WASD), mouse, and touch handlers
Load the skill at .copilot/skills/game-quality/SKILL.md for full workflow.
